summary: The plan has a critical internal mismatch: it hardcodes imperial in `(main)` while also expecting `(main)` pages to honor saved user preference.

issues.section: Step 6 (Wire provider into layouts), Key Decisions ((main) preference), Verification #2/#3/#4
issues.title: Main-route default blocks preference on core surfaces
issues.description: The plan sets `src/app/(main)/layout.tsx` to `initial="imperial"` with no resolver call. But the verification goals require preferred units on product detail, kit builder, and comparison surfaces. Those surfaces are in `(main)` routes (`/products/[id]`, `/kit/[id]`, `/kit/[id]/slot/[slotId]`), so after reload/navigation they will render imperial instead of the saved DB preference. This prevents the plan from meeting its own acceptance criteria.
issues.suggestion: Resolve preference for authenticated users in the `(main)` render path as well (e.g., in a shared main layout or existing main layouts/auth-aware shell), with anonymous fallback to imperial. Then update verification criteria to match the actual routing behavior.
